item.title: Corey Petty Media Appearances
item.description: Corey Petty is awesome, nuff said!

item.title: Attention and Augmented Recurrent Neural Networks
item.description: This is the ﬁrst paragraph of the article. Test a long — dash — here it is. Test for owner’s possessive. Test for “quoting a passage.” And another sentence. Or two. Some ﬂopping ﬁns; for diving. Here’s a test of an inline equation c = a^2 + b^2 . And then there’s a block equation: c = \pm \sqrt{ \sum_{i=0}^{n}{a^{222} + b^2}} We can also cite external publications.
